introSection: Thor's Hammer is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It opened in 2002.
fullText:
Thor's Hammer is a steel wild mouse roller coaster currently located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It opened in 2002.



Green track and brown supports.
